name: Chocolate Brownie Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two large baking sheets.
3. In a saucepan, melt chocolates over low heat.
4. Stir to blend the chocolates. Add condensed milk.
5. Mix in vanilla and almond extract (if used).
6. Let cool completely.
7. In a medium bowl, beat egg white and salt until foamy.
8. Gradually add sugar, beating to stiff peaks.
9. Sift chocolate mixture into a large bowl.
10. Stir in 1/4 of the beaten egg white.
11. Fold in the remaining beaten egg white.
12. Add shredded coconut.
13. Drop batter with a teaspoon onto baking sheets, making a total of 24 cookies.
14. Top each cookie with an almond if desired.
15. Bake one sheet at a time for 10-12 minutes or until the tops are dry but the centers remain moist.
16. Remove from oven and transfer to a wire rack to cool.
17. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.
